title: PPC Ecomm Agency needs Monday.com Specialist
excerpt:
Hi ppl, 
I am looking for someone who could help us move forward our Monday. I need help with: 

calculating work hours across bords
recuring task automatization
I am also open to any suggestions.

Thank you
